translated: I think this illustration was the first one released?
Everyone, look... Arisa-chan was partially visible in the corner.
It was posted as an image on Twitter and stuff.
It really makes you wonder,
"Who is this girl?"
Looking at this single illustration, Shizuku has such a cheerful expression,
but then Airi-chan is hissing, and Arisa-chan is just like, "Hmph."
It's really funny. Once you've seen the story, it all makes sense.
I really love this. Arisa-chan is irresistible, and Airi-chan's expression is...
it's just great.
Next up is Honoka-chan.
Isn't she super cute?
The trained version...
It's amazing.
It's a total change from Shizuku's outfit. The black and white with red accents is so cute.
And this leaf...
The way she's wearing a leaf on her head is just adorable, right?
I mentioned Korpokkur earlier,
but she really has that fairy-like vibe.
And here is the untrained version.
Snack time!
Honestly, it's just like that at the ProSeka studio. They always provide delicious food in the waiting room.
Everyone really digs in.
I got a bento today too, and there are snacks laid out like this.
It's actually quite realistic.
That feeling of being nervous before a show, but the snacks are so good you eat them anyway...
Just munching away.
I definitely want you all to check out this side story.
Seriously.
